Digital Delivery

These fields are useful for virtual products, licenses, subscriptions, and downloads.

Digital delivery fields stay hidden until Product Type is Virtual.

Publishing Controls

Status error
Choose how this product should behave operationally and on the storefront.
Specifications come next
Save the basic product record first. Product specifications are added from the product details page right after save.
